Sealing Expertise
About

Learn how CHX supports pneumatic and hydraulic industries with reliable products, integrated supply capability, and practical sealing solutions.

Who We Are

面向工业应用的
专业密封件供应商 A Professional Industrial Sealing Supplier with Practical Application Expertise

We are a professional supplier of industrial sealing products, offering a wide range of standard and engineered seals for global applications.

Backed by years of industry experience and an established supplier network, we provide not only products, but also practical sealing solutions tailored to real working conditions.

Our Strength in Numbers

By the Numbers Trusted by Experience, Proven by Numbers

20+ Years of Industry Experience
3000+ Product Types
10+ Industries Served
Global Export Capability
Global Supply Capability

Our Strength

Our Strength What Makes CHX a Reliable Sealing Supply Partner

Stable Supply Network

We partner with established manufacturers and maintain strong sourcing relationships to ensure product availability, consistent quality, and reliable delivery.

Quality Assurance System

We apply rigorous incoming inspection standards and work only with qualified suppliers to ensure consistent product performance and long-term reliability.

Extensive Product Range

We offer a comprehensive portfolio covering hydraulic seals, pneumatic seals, oil seals, and engineered sealing solutions.

Solution-Oriented Approach

We go beyond products to deliver practical sealing solutions based on real operating conditions.

Product Portfolio

Product Portfolio A Broad Portfolio Across Core Sealing Categories

We support both standard supply and customized solutions based on specific application needs.

Hydraulic seals Pneumatic seals High-pressure seals O-rings / X-rings Metal-cased oil seals Glyd rings / Step seals Dust wipers / Water seals Construction machinery seals

Why Choose Us

Green · Quality · Service · Integrity

We are committed to delivering reliable products, supporting sustainable development, and building long-term partnerships with our customers.

  • Stable quality
  • Wide product availability
  • Fast response
  • Technical support
  • Flexible solutions

We aim to be your trusted partner in sealing solutions.
